name: skarl86-assemble-team
description: Single-plugin marketplace for assemble-team: a 5-layer harness that converts a plan into a safely-spawned agent team, a single subagent, or a printed prompt.

plugins.name: assemble-team
plugins.description: 5-layer harness (Enrich → Map → Execute) that converts a plan into a safely-spawned agent team, a single subagent, or a printed prompt. Three sub-skills callable independently or chained via /assemble-team.
